nodes.label: नाव बनाओ नाव बनाओ
nodes.description: A playful poem about making paper boats and floating them in rainwater

nodes.label: गतिविधि (Activity)
nodes.description: Making paper boats from paper and floating them in water

nodes.label: सामग्री (Materials)
nodes.description: कागज़ (paper) to fold into a boat shape

nodes.label: नाव बनाना (Making the Boat)
nodes.description: Folding paper step by step to create a boat shape that can float

nodes.label: प्रकृति (Nature)
nodes.description: Natural elements that make the paper boat journey possible

nodes.label: बारिश (Rain)
nodes.description: Rain brings water in which boats can float - the rainy season is the best time

nodes.label: पानी (Water)
nodes.description: Puddles, streams, and flowing water where the boats sail

nodes.label: हवा (Wind)
nodes.description: Wind pushes the boat along, helping it travel farther

nodes.label: कल्पना (Imagination)
nodes.description: Children imagine the boat going on grand adventures to distant lands

nodes.label: नाव की यात्रा (Boat's Journey)
nodes.description: The boat floats through streams, rivers, and in imagination, to the sea

nodes.label: सपने (Dreams)
nodes.description: The boat carries the child's dreams and wishes to faraway places

nodes.label: काव्य तत्व (Poetic Elements)
nodes.description: Rhyming (तुकबंदी), rhythm (लय), and repetition make the poem musical

nodes.label: तुकबंदी (Rhyming)
nodes.description: Matching sounds at the end of lines create a song-like quality

nodes.label: खुशी और मज़ा (Joy & Fun)
nodes.description: The poem celebrates the simple joy of childhood play and creativity
